menuItem.subtitle: Setup / Intro
menuItem.description: Overall set up and connecting of Github, Azure and System. Click the reference for the 4 pdf of the instructions of installation and connecting of the systems. Check the results for the pdf for the proof of connecting the systems.

menuItem.subtitle: Resume
menuItem.description: Creating a Resume using HTML and CSS. Click the results to see my resume and the reference to see a resume template provided.

menuItem.subtitle: Personal Website
menuItem.description: Creating a Information Architecture diagram for this website. Click the Results to see the diagram, the reference for the instructions and the back icon to explore the website.

menuItem.subtitle: Personal Website Enhancement
menuItem.description: Creating an AI enhanced website design of this website.

menuItem.subtitle: RSS and Atom Feeds
menuItem.description: Created a valid RSS and Atom feed using XML to publish updates from my Intro to ITWS labs.

menuItem.subtitle: JavaScript Form Validation
menuItem.description: Added JavaScript validation to an HTML form to prevent blank submissions and added interactive features like a comment field placeholder and nickname button. Also fixed form label attributes and focus styling in the CSS.

menuItem.subtitle: jQuery Introduction
menuItem.description: We were introduced to jQuery. We practiced handling click events, showing/hiding content, toggling styles, and adding elements to the page without ever reloading the browser.

menuItem.subtitle: JavaScript, JSON and AJAX
menuItem.description: Built a dynamic lab list page using jQuery and AJAX. Lab entries are stored in a JSON file and loaded dynamically on page load

menuItem.subtitle: SQL & PHP Database
menuItem.description: Connected a MySQL database to PHP to build a dynamic movie database app. Created tables, inserted actors from a CSV, wrote relational queries, and displayed movies and actor relationships across multiple PHP-rendered tabs.

menuItem.subtitle: Production Deployment, SSL & Auto-Deploy
menuItem.description: Deployed the website to a live Azure VM, secured sensitive labs with .htaccess password protection, enabled HTTPS via a free Let's Encrypt certificate, and set up automatic deployment from GitHub using a webhook handler with HMAC signature verification.
